response.global_analysis:
1. Lyrics and Narrative: The spoken audio matched the lyrics perfectly. For 'Sympathy', correct original song lyrics were transcribed and translated manually instead of relying on wrong lyrics. For 'M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!', the exact English vocals were used for both transcription and translation. For the narrative section, precise Japanese transcriptions and their corresponding English translations were synchronized with the audio.
2. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were structured to follow natural speech patterns, with start and end times meticulously synchronized to the vocals. Continuous sentences were segmented logically. No closed captions or sound effect descriptions were used.

subtitles.original: だったよな
subtitles.english: ...wasn't it?

subtitles.original: 暗闇のなかで 立ち止まり 手放してしまう
subtitles.english: Stopping in the darkness, and letting go

subtitles.original: 心が通じ合えない孤独感を 押し殺してしまうなら
subtitles.english: If I end up crushing this feeling of isolation when our hearts can't connect...

subtitles.original: 一人でいた方が 楽に生きられたかな
subtitles.english: ...I wonder if it would have been easier to live alone?

subtitles.original: 憧れ 理想に 強く惹かれる感情が
subtitles.english: This feeling strongly drawn towards yearning and ideals...

subtitles.original: 僕らを引き寄せてしまうのなら
subtitles.english: ...if it draws us together...

subtitles.original: 応えて
subtitles.english: ...then answer me!

subtitles.original: 狂わせて
subtitles.english: Drive me crazy...

subtitles.original: まだ終わっちゃいないんだ 僕らの延長戦を
subtitles.english: It's not over yet, our extra time...

subtitles.original: この音が途切れるまで
subtitles.english: ...until this sound cuts out!

subtitles.original: 子供の頃に描いたヒーロー
subtitles.english: The hero I pictured when I was a kid...

subtitles.original: 君の出番が 待っている
subtitles.english: ...your turn to shine is waiting!

subtitles.original: 震わせて 忘れないよう 掻き鳴らした日々を
subtitles.english: Make me tremble, so I won't forget the days we strummed away

subtitles.original: あの日
subtitles.english: On that day,

subtitles.original: 僕らは 間違っていなかったんだと知る
subtitles.english: we'll know we weren't wrong.

subtitles.original: 閉ざして しまい込んだ 一閃の光 探して
subtitles.english: Searching for the flash of light we locked and shut away...

subtitles.original: 君の声を聴かせて
subtitles.english: ...let me hear your voice!

subtitles.original: ここにいるって叫んでくれよ
subtitles.english: Shout out that you're right here!

subtitles.original: その手を離さないで
subtitles.english: Don't let go of that hand!

subtitles.original: 魂に心を開け？簡単に言ってくれる。
subtitles.english: Opening up to the spirit? That was a tall order.

subtitles.original: 探偵になる前の彼女の人生において、他者に心を開くのは危険な行為だった。
subtitles.english: In her life before being a detective, opening up to someone was dangerous.

subtitles.original: 今でもその本能は変わらない。
subtitles.english: That instinct still lingers.

subtitles.original: 結局何も進展はなかった。
subtitles.english: This was getting her nowhere.

subtitles.original: 謎はまだ残っているが、彼女はここのところ無理が続いていた。
subtitles.english: She still had questions she needed answered, but maybe she had wound herself up too much.

subtitles.original: 少し休まなければ。
subtitles.english: She needed a break.

subtitles.original: Hello everyone!
subtitles.english: Hello everyone!

subtitles.original: I'm Hatsune Miku!
subtitles.english: I'm Hatsune Miku!

subtitles.original: Well, that's what everyone seems to think, but secretly I'm...
subtitles.english: Well, that's what everyone seems to think, but secretly I'm...

subtitles.original: Miku-chan!
subtitles.english: Miku-chan!

subtitles.original: Anya-chan!
subtitles.english: Anya-chan!

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌おう！
subtitles.english: Let's sing together!

subtitles.original: I wake up to a call, put my frilly outfit on now
subtitles.english: I wake up to a call, put my frilly outfit on now

subtitles.original: It's time I open up my eyes and start the day
subtitles.english: It's time I open up my eyes and start the day

subtitles.original: I combat till the dawn, until every villain's gone, wah!
subtitles.english: I combat till the dawn, until every villain's gone, wah!
